comic.title: Zero
comic.caption: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Donec tempus quam purus, sit amet ornare urna pulvinar eget. Pellentesque magna eros, pretium sit.

panel.caption: Floor 30. Hooded prisoners crammed into a descending elevator; screams rise from below.
Floor 29. Bursun and Yaharia stand calm while the others tremble.
Floor 28. "Hi, I'm Yaharia, Yaharia Akinosun. What's your name?"
Floor 27. Bursun glances, then looks away. Silence.
Floor 26. "Silly me — we don't have names. I named myself and assumed you did the same."
Floor 25. "I know — I'll give you a name! How about…?"
Floor 24. Reveal — the voice was never Bursun's thoughts. Yaharia is telepathic.
Floor 23. "Bursun!!" — Yaharia delivers the chosen name.
Floor 22. "How about it — sound good?"
Floor 21. Bursun, again, says nothing.
Floor 20. "Hmm — I'll take that as a yes."
Floor 00. KSSHK — the doors part onto cold blue-white light.
"Well — looks like it's our turn."
The other prisoners beg as guards force them in. Bursun and Yaharia walk forward on their own.
Inside the linking chamber. Scientists pull down hoods and plug tails into the cradles.
Seated in a circle — Bursun in profile, past the back of the cybervator before him.
Yaharia pulls down her own hood.
Bursun's eyes are already closed. Yaharia's stay open. Everyone else is nervous.
Injections at the neck and shoulder. Bursun is already in cyberspace.
From the viewing room above: "This one's already hyper-linked." The others slump into the link.
Cyberspace. The cybervators glow with flowing hair, eyes but no mouths, numbers stamped on their chests.
Bursun sits cross-legged, calm. The others scatter and run.
Yaharia stands over him, talking. "Wow — it feels so real. My hallucinations have never felt this real before."
"Oh my goodness — look at your hair. And your mouth, it's gone. Do I look like that?"
Above the chamber: scientists watch their monitors. A cybervator's head detonates — "There goes another one."
Behind Bursun, a Honey Badger Cyber.Beast rises into frame. Yaharia, oblivious: "Ooh — look, a Cyber.Beast."
The Honey Badger Cyber.Beast lunges and swallows Bursun whole.
Yaharia, fanatical: "You — you ate my friend!"
She hurls herself at the beast, prying at its jaws. "Let him go!"
Something shifts inside the Cyber.Beast — its skin flares with unfamiliar light.
"Uh-oh. What did I dooo…?"
Inside the beast: Bursun isn't being eaten — he's absorbing it.
Back in the chamber, his vitals spike off the chart. His body glows.
The scientists in the viewing room go pale. No one has ever read like this.
The other Cyber.Beasts turn away from the cybervators. They've noticed something new.
They close in on Bursun from every side.
The whole pack piles on top of him.
Yaharia, watching: "Huh!?"
Bursun erupts in a column of light, hurling the pack outward.
Yaharia, astonished: "Wow. Is that…? Hey — Bursun! Is that you?"
He looks at her, says nothing, and turns back to the next Cyber.Beast.
Yaharia, thrilled, cheers him on as Bursun tears through them.
A Cyber.Beast swoops in from above and snatches him out of the air.
He breaks free mid-flight and crashes down onto the one beneath, mid-roar.
Yaharia leaps onto a Cyber.Beast of her own. "No fair — why should you get to have all the fun?"
